fragment:
<set-variable name="cache-settings" value="@{
		try {
			var configStr = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("metadata-config", "{}");
			var config = JObject.Parse(configStr);
			var settings = config["cache-settings"] as JObject;
			if (settings != null) {
				return settings;
			}
			// Default cache settings
			return JObject.Parse(@"{'config-version':'1.0.0','ttl-seconds':300}");
		} catch {
			return JObject.Parse(@"{'config-version':'1.0.0','ttl-seconds':300}");
		}
	}" />
	
	<set-variable name="cache-config-version" value="@{
		var settings = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-settings");
		return settings?["config-version"]?.ToString() ?? "1.0.0";
	}" />
	<set-variable name="cache-ttl-seconds" value="@{
		var settings = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-settings");
		return settings?["ttl-seconds"]?.Value() ?? 300;
	}" />
	
	
	
	<set-variable name="cache-key" value="@{
		var version = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-config-version", "1.0.0");
		return "metadata-config-v" + version;
	}" />
	
		
		<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-bypass-requested", false))">
			
			<set-variable name="config-loaded" value="@{
				try {
					var configStr = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("metadata-config", "{}");
					return JObject.Parse(configStr);
				} catch {
					return new JObject();
				}
			}" />
			
			<set-variable name="config-models" value="@{
				var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
				return config["models"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
			}" />
			<set-variable name="config-api-types" value="@{
				var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
				return config["api-types"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
			}" />
			<set-variable name="config-timeout-settings" value="@{
				var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
				return config["timeout-settings"] as JObject ?? JObject.Parse(@"{'streaming-multiplier':3}");
			}" />
			
			
				@($"UAIG - Cache bypass requested for {context.Request.Url.Path}")
			
			
		
		
		
			
			
			<cache-lookup-value key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-key"))" variable-name="cached-config-metadata" />
			
				
				
					
					<set-variable name="cached-metadata" value="@{
						try {
							return JObject.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cached-config-metadata"));
						} catch {
							return new JObject();
						}
					}" />
					
					
						@($"UAIG - Configuration loaded from cache for {context.Request.Url.Path}")
					
					
					
					<set-variable name="config-models" value="@{
						var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cached-metadata");
						return cached["models"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
					}" />
					<set-variable name="config-api-types" value="@{
						var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cached-metadata");
						return cached["api-types"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
					}" />
					<set-variable name="config-timeout-settings" value="@{
						var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cached-metadata");
						return cached["timeout-settings"] as JObject ?? JObject.Parse(@"{'streaming-multiplier':3}");
					}" />
				
				
				
					
					<set-variable name="config-loaded" value="@{
						try {
							var configStr = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("metadata-config", "{}");
							return JObject.Parse(configStr);
						} catch {
							return new JObject();
						}
					}" />
					
					<set-variable name="config-models" value="@{
						var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
						return config["models"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
					}" />
					<set-variable name="config-api-types" value="@{
						var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
						return config["api-types"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
					}" />
					<set-variable name="config-timeout-settings" value="@{
						var config = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-loaded");
						return config["timeout-settings"] as JObject ?? JObject.Parse(@"{'streaming-multiplier':3}");
					}" />
					
					<set-variable name="cache-metadata" value="@{
						var metadata = new JObject();
						metadata["models"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-models");
						metadata["api-types"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-api-types");
						metadata["timeout-settings"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-timeout-settings");
						return metadata.ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None);
					}" />
					
					
					<cache-store-value 
						key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-key"))" 
						value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-metadata"))" 
						duration="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-ttl-seconds", 300))" />
					
					
						@($"UAIG - Configuration stored in cache for {context.Request.Url.Path}")
